items.title: Fed, McCormick, Tesla, Amazon's Big Deal Days: What to Watch
items.description: Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Tuesday, October 7, including commentary from top Federal Reserve officials, earnings results from McCormick (MKC), a Tesla (TSLA) announcement that the EV developer teased on social media, and the start of Amazon Prime Big Deal Days (AMZN). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: How Amazon’s October Prime Day Could Help Predict Holiday Shoe Demand
items.description: Amazon's Prime Day sales, along with retailers' own early specials, could get consumers into the holiday spirit and shoe-buying mood.

items.title: Nvidia, Amazon, Oracle dominate as retail investors buy the dips
items.description: Trading volume rose to a six-month high in September thanks to names like Nvidia (NVDA), Amazon (AMZN), and Oracle (ORCL). However, according to Charles Schwab, 38% of investors are feeling bearish. Charles Schwab's head trading and derivatives strategist, Joe Mazzola, breaks down the survey's findings on Asking for a Trend. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.
